title: Bonnaya zanzibarica
taxonomy: Bonnaya zanzibarica is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 13,000 species. Bonnaya zanzibarica is further classified as a genus of flowering plants within the tribe Spermaeae. Bonnaya zanzibarica's classification is an example of the complex and hierarchical system used to categorize plants in the botanical world.
